nasb.text: “When you enter your neighbor’s standing grain, then you may pluck the heads with your hand, but you shall not wield a sickle in your neighbor’s standing grain.

esv.text: If you go into your neighbor’s standing grain, you may pluck the ears with your hand, but you shall not put a sickle to your neighbor’s standing grain.

cnv.text: 你進了你鄰舍的麥田，你可以用手摘麥穗，只是不可在你鄰舍的麥田裡揮動鐮刀。”

ccb.text: 如果你们进了邻居的麦田，可以用手摘麦穗，但不可用镰刀割麦子。
